sse-broadcast.description: Covers manages the live set of Server-Sent Events client connections in a `Map<http.ServerResponse, {dashboardFilter}>` and exposes `broadcast`, `addClient`, `removeClient`, `startHeartbeat`, `stopHeartbeat`, and `closeAll` as the single public surface for fan-out.

sse-server.description: Covers hTTP server entry point that wires together SSEManager, DashboardService, WatcherService, QueueService, and apiRoutes into a single pure-Node `http` server (no framework).

svg-routing.description: Covers bFS-based dependency-line and sibling-communication-line drawing for WavePipeline / ChainPipeline SVG overlays.

swarm-builder.description: Covers backs the in-app Swarm Builder modal with CRUD operations on a dashboard's initialization.json: createSwarm (also resets logs.json + clears progress/), addTask, updateTask, removeTask (with depends_on cleanup + progress file deletion), addWave, removeWave (wit Form modal for creating or editing a single task (agent) inside the SwarmBuilder before the swarm is launched.

swarm-history.description: Covers lists archived swarm snapshots from the {tracker_root}/Archive/ directory. Lists past completed swarm runs sourced from {tracker_root}/history/*.json (via api.getHistory()) plus an optional analytics section computed by the !history --analytics command.

swarm-lifecycle.description: Covers documentation page for the swarm-lifecycle area: Circuit Breaker. Documentation page for the swarm-lifecycle area: Completion Phase.

swarm-monitoring.description: Covers detailed view of a single swarm agent/task. Full-screen log viewer for a single dashboard's logs.json content.

swarm-orchestration.description: Covers agentCard participates in the dashboards subpage. AgentDetails is a shared modal component opened by App-level modal routing.

swarm-pipeline.description: Covers chain-row layout for swarms whose tasks form linear dependency chains. Embedded swarm builder/editor view used to compose initialization.json before launching a swarm.

swarm-planning.description: Covers single-export `validateDependencyGraph(agents)` that performs four structural checks on a Synapse swarm's agent dependency graph and returns `{valid, errors, warnings}`.

Synapse.description: Covers command specification for `!add_task`. Command specification for `!cancel-safe`.

task-decomposition.description: Covers aI-powered task planner that decomposes a natural-language work request into a parallel task swarm structure (initialization.json shape: task, agents[], waves[], chains[], history[]).

task-details.description: Covers read-only metadata view for a swarm task (the top-level swarm record from initialization.json — distinct from per-agent details).

task-editor.description: Covers form modal for creating or editing a single task (agent) inside the SwarmBuilder before the swarm is launched.

terminal.description: Covers interactive xterm.js terminal backed by a node-pty PTY in the Electron main process. VS Code-style bottom panel with Terminal, Problems, Output, Debug Console, and Ports tabs.

terminal-sessions.description: Covers manages PTY-backed terminal sessions for the in-app Terminal tab and worker terminals.

theme.description: Covers theme constants (status/level/timeline color maps) plus initStatusColorsFromCSS() that pulls the canonical theme from CSS custom properties at runtime.

theme-system.description: Covers application-wide settings: theme picker (6 named themes + Custom), custom-color picker (bg/surface/text/accent/completed/error), App Configuration numeric inputs (dashboardCount, init/progress/reconcile poll timings), and Updates section (current version, late

time-formatting.description: Covers three small time-formatting helpers used across panels and cards: formatElapsed (since-start in 'Hh Mm' or 'Mm Ss'), formatTime (HH:MM:SS), calcDuration (between two timestamps in 'Mm Ss' or 'Ss').

timing-constants.description: Covers defines all server-side named constants — directory paths resolved from the tracker root, polling/timing intervals tuned for fs.watch reliability, and shared default object shapes.

token-budget.description: Covers a planning-time token-budget estimator used by the master agent to size worker prompts before dispatch.

tool-use-rendering.description: Covers live worker output viewer rendering the agent's tool-use stream as a Claude-style conversation.

tracker-root-enforcement.description: Covers preToolUse hook on Bash. PreToolUse hook on Edit|Write.

troubleshooting.description: Covers documentation page for the troubleshooting area: FAQ -- Frequently Asked Questions. Documentation page for the troubleshooting area: Troubleshooting -- Common Issues.

ui-styling.description: Covers stylesheet for pages/code/subpages/code-explorer/styles/ide-layout.css that participates in the renderer layout and visual state for the Synapse desktop interface. Stylesheet for pages/code/subpages/git/styles/git-manager.css that participates in the renderer layout and visual state for the Synapse desktop interface.

user-onboarding.description: Covers long-form product and architecture explanation for Synapse, covering problem framing, UI areas, dashboard behavior, command categories, and developer workflow. Public-facing repository README for onboarding users to Synapse, explaining installation, launch, command usage, major features, and best practices.

user-preferences.description: Covers persistent settings store backed by a single JSON file at {userData}/synapse-settings.json.

variables.description: Covers vS Code-style debug sidebar with four collapsible sections: Variables, Call Stack, Breakpoints, Watch Expressions.

view-routing.description: Covers root React component that owns view routing, IPC bootstrap, modal hosting, and the floating Claude chat panel.

vite-build.description: Covers vite build configuration for the React renderer.

vite-bundler.description: Covers one-shot Monaco Editor web-worker bootstrap for Vite.

webview-injection.description: Covers standalone IIFE injected into the Live Preview webview via webContents.executeJavaScript().

webview-overlay.description: Covers previewView is the React component that powers the Live Preview tab.

welcome.description: Covers welcome screen rendered when ideWorkspaces is empty.

worker.description: Covers agent protocol/control-plane instruction document: Worker Agent — Progress Reporting Protocol. Agent protocol/control-plane instruction document: Worker Agent — Return Format.

worker-coaching.description: Covers postToolUse hook on Edit|Write. PostToolUse hook on Write.

worker-output.description: Covers live worker output viewer rendering the agent's tool-use stream as a Claude-style conversation.

worker-protocol.description: Covers claude Code skill definition for `worker-protocol`. Documentation page for the worker-protocol area: Deviation Reporting.

workspace.description: Covers horizontal tab bar for the IDE editor area. Recursive file-tree view rendered from state.ideFileTrees[workspaceId].

workspace-tabs.description: Covers top-level Code Explorer layout. Top-of-IDE horizontal tab bar listing all open workspace folders with a '+' add button.

xss-safety.description: Covers lightweight zero-dependency Markdown renderer specifically tuned for the subset Claude produces.
